'''Team Ord Mantell''' was a [[Limmie/Legends|limmie]] team that played for<ref name="HNN" /> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="EGtP&M">''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]''</ref> of [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] in the [[Galactic Cup of Limmie]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|13:3]], during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]],<ref name="HNN" /> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="EGtP&M" /> of [[Kothlis/Legends|Kothlis's]] [[Team Kothlis|team]] defeated them with a single point in the Cup's opening round. An article published in the [[CoCo Town/Legends|CoCo District]] edition of the [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] covered the result of the match.<ref name="HNN" />

==Behind the scenes==
Team Ord Mantell was mentioned in ''Coruscant Eliminated in Galactic Cup Opening Round'' an article<ref name="HNN" /> written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]].<ref name="credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref> and published in ''[[HoloNet News Vol. 531 47]]'' on the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]]<ref name="HNN" /> on [[March 14]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN47 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6042498|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-03-14|time=5:40 PM|archivedate=20200305125429}}</ref>
